title: Declaring a constant with simultaneous initialization may result in an error depending on the lifetime and context

features.name: const static initialization in initial block
features.description: Code should include a const static variable with initialization declared inside an initial procedural block

features.name: const automatic initialization in initial block
features.description: Code should include a const automatic variable with initialization declared inside an initial procedural block

features.name: const automatic initialization in static function
features.description: Code should include a const automatic variable with initialization declared inside a static function

features.name: const automatic initialization in automatic function
features.description: Code should include a const automatic variable with initialization declared inside an automatic function
